commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Sechenias. 3 Esdras calls him "Jechonias. "See chap. viii. 5. The name of Sechenias is not found among the transgressors; (ver. 20.) but that of Jehiel is, ver. 26. It seems, however, that the former returned with Esdras, and speaks in the name of the people, to encourage them to confess their guilt, (Calmet) unless his name be omitted. (Menochius)
Repentance. Hebrew, "yet there is hope, (Protestants) or an assembly of Israel. "(Du Dieu)
